step_rationale: Fibrinogen-like protein elevated after plaque rupture; inflammation and thrombosis.
mechanism: FGL1 is released following plaque rupture and participates in inflammatory and hemostatic responses, potentially stabilizing or propagating the thrombus.

references.title: Comparative Analysis of Plasma Protein Dynamics in Women with ST-Elevation Myocardial Infarction and Takotsubo Syndrome.
Study on Proteomics-Based Aortic Dissection Molecular Markers Using iTRAQ Combined With Label Free Techniques.
The human HDL proteome displays high inter-individual variability and is altered dynamically in response to angioplasty-induced atheroma plaque rupture.
